task_completion.description: Open the m51.tif image in Fiji
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Fiji (ImageJ) application is open and displaying the m51.tif image, which shows two galaxies (a large central spiral and a smaller companion at the top).

task_completion.description: Segment the galaxies from the background
task_completion.visual_evidence: The image is shown with a threshold applied (e.g., red overlay or black/white binary mask) separating the bright galaxies from the dark background.

task_completion.description: Separate and select the companion galaxy (NGC 5195) only
task_completion.visual_evidence: An active selection (yellow ROI outline) or isolated mask is visible ONLY around the smaller companion galaxy at the top of the image. The main central spiral galaxy must not be included in this selection.
The 'Set Measurements' dialog in Fiji is visible with the following options checked: Area, Centroid, Mean gray value, Integrated density, and Fit ellipse.
A 'Save As' dialog for the Results table is saving to '~/Fiji_Data/results/galaxy/companion_metrics.csv', or a terminal/file explorer confirms the creation of this specific file.

task_completion.description: Save the segmentation mask or ROI outlines to segmentation_map.png
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog for the image is saving to '~/Fiji_Data/results/galaxy/segmentation_map.png', or a terminal/file explorer confirms the creation of this specific file.

integrity.description: The agent used the Fiji GUI to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with Fiji menus (e.g., Image > Adjust > Threshold, Analyze > Analyze Particles, or Analyze > Measure) rather than just running a pre-written script in the terminal.

integrity.description: The measurements reflect genuine analysis of the companion galaxy
integrity.visual_evidence: The Fiji 'Results' window should display plausible values for the companion galaxy (e.g., Y-centroid is less than 200, Area is between 1000 and 8000). The agent should not be seen manually typing these values into a text editor.

integrity.description: Measurements were taken for the companion galaxy only, not the main galaxy or both combined
integrity.visual_evidence: The Results table should ideally show a single row of measurements corresponding to the top galaxy, or if multiple rows exist, the agent explicitly saves only the row where the Y-centroid is < 200.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The m51.tif image contains two galaxies. The target companion galaxy (NGC 5195) is located at the top of the image with a Y-centroid between 179 and 199 (Y < 200). The main spiral galaxy (M51) is in the center with a Y-centroid around 254. The companion galaxy's area should be between 1000 and 8000 pixels. The measurements must be for the companion galaxy only, completely separated from the main spiral.
